name: Hard Money Georgia
description_short: Capital Fund 1 is a hard money lender in Atlanta specializing in real estate investment financing with same-day underwriting and 24-hour funding capabilities.
description_long:
Capital Fund 1 operates as a private hard money lender based in Atlanta, Georgia, serving real estate investors across the region. The company positions itself as a responsive alternative to traditional bank financing, emphasizing speed and flexibility in loan approval and funding processes. Their team highlights over 170 years of combined lending and investing experience as a key differentiator in the market.

Capital Fund 1 offers a comprehensive suite of hard money loan products tailored to real estate investors, including fix-and-flip loans, buy-and-hold loans, commercial bridge loans, construction and development loans, home remodel loans, lot and land loans, trustee sale and foreclosure auction loans, multifamily loans, cash-out refinance loans, and DSCR long-term rental loans. Each product is designed to address specific investment strategies and property types within the Atlanta market.

The company distinguishes itself through its streamlined loan process, claiming to provide underwriting terms as soon as the same day and funding within 24 hours of closing. Their application process is entirely online and emphasizes rapid in-house underwriting rather than relying on external processors. The dedicated lending team structure is positioned as enabling faster decision-making compared to traditional lenders.

Hard money lending carries inherent higher costs and shorter terms than conventional financing, making it suitable primarily for experienced real estate investors with specific time-sensitive projects rather than general borrowers. While Capital Fund 1 emphasizes speed and flexibility, prospective borrowers should expect rates and fees substantially higher than traditional bank loans, and the lack of specific rate information on their website prevents independent cost comparison.
pros: Same-day underwriting and loan terms available
Funding completed in as little as 24 hours post-closing
Fully online application process with rapid document review
Wide range of specialized real estate loan products (10+ loan types)
Team claims 170+ years combined lending and investing experience
Serves multiple property types: residential, commercial, multifamily, and land
Dedicated loan servicing phone line for existing customers
cons: No interest rates or fee schedules disclosed on website, preventing cost transparency
Hard money loans typically carry significantly higher costs than traditional bank financing
Limited eligibility information—appears primarily designed for experienced real estate investors
No customer reviews, ratings, or third-party verification visible on provided website content
Requires signed purchase contract to initiate underwriting process, indicating less flexibility for preliminary inquiries
best_for: Real estate investors with time-sensitive fix-and-flip or development projects
Property flippers and developers needing quick bridge financing between deals
Commercial investors targeting auction or foreclosure properties requiring immediate funding
Experienced real estate investors building rental property portfolios who need flexibility beyond traditional lending
diagnosis: Capital Fund 1 is best suited for experienced real estate investors who need fast funding for specific investment projects and have existing equity or strong deals to leverage. The primary caveat is that hard money lending is substantially more expensive than traditional financing; borrowers should obtain specific rate and fee quotes to understand the true cost before committing, as none are disclosed on their website.
services: Fix and flip loans for rapid property turnovers
Buy and hold loans for rental property portfolios
Commercial bridge loans for time-sensitive opportunities
Lot and land loans for raw land purchases
Trustee sale and foreclosure auction loans
Cash-out refinance loans for equity access
